---
title: "Introduction to fastrenameR"
author: "Serigne Fallou Mbacke NGOM"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to fastrenameR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Introduction

`fastrenameR` is an R package for fast and flexible renaming of FASTA sequence headers using metadata files.

## Installation

```r
devtools::install_github("Serigne-Fallu/fastrenameR")
```

## Basic Usage

```r
library(fastrenameR)
show_columns("metadata.tsv")
fastrenameR("metadata.tsv", "sequences.fasta",
            id_col = "accessionVersion",
            out_cols = c("geoLocCountry", "sampleCollectionDate"))
```

## Date Standardization

```r
standardize_dates(c("5-15-2024", "5-2024", "2024.5", "2024"))
standardize_fasta_dates("sequences.fasta", "BEASTready.fasta")
```
